title: Records Controller — Nuclear Decommissioning (Contract)
description_raw:
Jonathan Lee Recruitment are seeking a Records Controller to support the nuclear decommissioning programme at Harwell Campus (UKAEA). This role is engaged outside IR35.

The Records Controller will manage the quality records function for mechanical decommissioning work packages, ensuring all inspection, test, and as-built records are captured and archived in accordance with NDA lifetime records requirements.

Key responsibilities:
- Manage the nuclear quality records system for mechanical decommissioning work packages
- Capture and archive inspection and test records (ITRs) for plant removal activities
- Control as-built drawing records for decommissioned nuclear plant
- Liaise with the Responsible Mechanical Engineer on record completeness
- Maintain compliance with NDA nuclear records retention schedule
- Support decommissioning completion milestone evidence packs

Profile:
- 3+ years as Records Controller or Document Controller in nuclear or high-hazard industry
- Familiar with nuclear quality records requirements (BS EN ISO 9001, IAEA Q1)
- Experience with nuclear safety-class record management preferred
- SC clearance held or clearable

Rate: £260–£300/day outside IR35
Duration: 12 months
Start: ASAP
Location: Harwell Campus, Oxfordshire
